title: Casting Couch Slaughter 2: The Second Coming
original_title: Casting Couch Slaughter 2: The Second Coming
overview: In 1998, three film students, obsessed with true crime stories, and porn, set out to make a porno documentary about the murdered porn stars and along the way, make their own version of the casting couch.
